content:
Artist: Green Day
Song: Wake Me Up When September Ends

This is a simplified version of the song that only uses 4 Chords.

This is recommended for beginner guitarist to practice and learn the song before moving 
more advanced chord progressions and styling.

Transpose Down 5 half steps using the Ultimate-Guitar transposing tool to change the 
below so you can play with the original Green Day version.

Alternatively Capo the 7th fret and use the chords below to play with the original Green 
version.


[Intro]

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
